title: Project Asteria
body:
## Description

Welcome to Project Asteria! In it, you can do whatever you want. For example, you can cook food, construct all sorts of mechanisms, build houses, explore new worlds and fight enemies.
Modpack has over 300 mods. A stable game will require a minimum of 8 GB of RAM.

## Peculiarities

- New movement system
- New combat system
- New background sounds
- New building blocks
- Thirst and temperature
- Three new dimensions
- Over 20 new bosses
- Over 600 new achievements
- Mod Create with addons
- Mod Farmer's Delight with addons
- Three-headed ender dragon with new attacks
- New illagers
- Dinosaurs
- Lost wild update content
- A bunch of tweaks
- Optimizer mods
- Shader support
- Added Herobrine
- And others...

## Version Support

This modpack is for Forge 1.19.2.
